meaning: n.纷争解决者,调解纷争专家
examples: Click the Troubleshooter button if the wheel does not work as expected.
Each "flow" in the Guided Troubleshooter is recorded in the Case Manager, enabling you to put all diagnostic information in one place.
In DB2 V8.2, a notification troubleshooter was added to ensure that notifications are set up and work correctly before an alert is generated.
It will take on inventory risk and act as a troubleshooter for small firms.
Mr Richardson, who sometimes acts as a diplomatic troubleshooter, returned to the US on Wednesday.
